subject: Expense Report Policy Update - Effective April 1st
body:
All Staff,

We're updating our expense report policy effective April 1st. Key changes:

- Per diem for domestic travel increases from $75 to $85
- International travel per diem now varies by city (see attached table)
- Receipts required for all expenses over $25 (previously $50)
- Mileage reimbursement rate updated to $0.70/mile per IRS guidelines
- New pre-approval required for conferences exceeding $2,000

All expense reports must be submitted within 30 days of travel completion. Late submissions will be processed in the following month's payroll cycle.

Please review the full policy document on the intranet and direct any questions to the finance team.
